title: westringia crassifolia
intro: Westringia crassifolia, also known as Coombera or Lemon Bush, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been found to have numerous health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Westringia crassifolia can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
